description: Leady identifies anonymous website visitors for B2B teams, delivering company and individual profiles with real-time data and integrations to 750+ CRM and marketing tools.
overview: Leady helps B2B sales and marketing teams identify the companies and individuals visiting their website, turning anonymous traffic into detailed prospect profiles. It delivers real-time visitor data, supports targeted campaigns, and connects with over 750 CRM and marketing tools to fit naturally into existing go-to-market workflows.
what_is: Leady is a lead generation and customer intelligence platform that identifies the businesses visiting your website and enriches those visits with real-time company and contact data. By converting anonymous traffic into named prospects, it helps sales and marketing teams discover new leads and monitor existing customers' engagement without waiting for form submissions. Teams use Leady to deepen their understanding of buyer behavior and make faster, more informed decisions about outreach.

Leady is particularly effective for B2B companies, with a strong fit for SaaS businesses that want to track user behavior and run precisely targeted campaigns. Insights and qualified leads typically begin appearing within a day of setup, allowing sales and marketing teams to act on fresh data promptly rather than working from stale lists.

The platform integrates with over 750 CRM and marketing tools, making it straightforward to fold into an existing GTM stack. It supports email campaigns and data enrichment workflows, though it is not designed for direct consumer sales or large-scale eCommerce analytics. Its focus on B2B company profiles and buyer behavior makes it well suited to improving both conversion rates and customer retention.
